evidence: we are investing significant resources in our cloud computing solutions and platform, working on expanding capacity, adding additional sites and developing increased cloud computing features and functionality
we introduced new NVIDIA GPUs that are well-suited for... training and inference with neural networks... and high-performance computing applications

In November 2025, Akamai acquired serverless WebAssembly company Fermyon Technologies... As AI inference shifts to the edge, combining Fermyon's cloud-native WebAssembly function-as-a-service with Akamai's globally distributed platform enables enterprises to build edge-native applications
In 2025, Akamai launched Firewall for AI, a new solution designed to provide protection for AI applications against unauthorized queries, adversarial inputs and large-scale data-scraping attempts
Also in 2025, Akamai launched Akamai Inference Cloud ('AIC'), a platform that expands AI inference from core data centers to the edge of the internet

AI network labeling examines how assets are behaving and suggests labels to help security teams apply appropriate controls, and generative AI allows security professionals to ask natural language questions of their network

We may not be successful in our artificial intelligence initiatives... we recently launched AIC... This introduces additional risks, as we now compete with established and emerging companies providing AI infrastructure and inference solutions
AI systems and third-party AI services that we use may also introduce operational resilience and stability risks that could disrupt our services or customers' workloads

The EU began implementing the Artificial Intelligence Act on August 1, 2024... imposes significant obligations on providers and deployers of high-risk AI systems, and non-compliance can lead to substantial fines

capex_mentions.quote: we are experiencing continued volatility in certain server component costs, including as a result of recently imposed tariffs, that support the continued build out of our AI, infrastructure and platform services
capex_mentions.context: Risk factors discussion of supply chain and cost pressures for AI infrastructure build-out
